subject: Gaming
title: The Battle Pass Treadmill
description: Learn The Battle Pass Treadmill in one minute.

hook.text: Battle passes expire. If you don't play enough, you lose what you paid for. Gaming invented expiring purchases.

buildup.text: Fortnite popularized the battle pass model: pay $10, complete challenges, unlock rewards before the season ends.

discovery.text: The model creates obligation. Players feel forced to play regularly or waste their purchase.

twist.text: Multiple games run battle passes simultaneously. Players can't keep up. The treadmill becomes exhausting.

climax.text: Some games now offer non-expiring passes after backlash. The industry slowly responds to player fatigue.

punchline.text: Pay for it. Play or lose it. Gaming invented purchases that expire.

quiz.question: What is the main criticism of battle pass systems?
options: They create obligation to play regularly or lose what was paid for
They give too many free rewards
